title: SAP B1 Manager
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW
Our client is a leading ICT and digital solutions integrator in Southeast Asia. The organization serves over a thousand clients across multiple industries and operates in several ASEAN countries.

They are looking for a SAP B1 Manager to lead pre‑sales, project delivery, and a team of consultants to grow the SAP Business One business. This role requires strong SAP B1 expertise, customer engagement skills, and proven leadership.

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Pre‑Sales

·        Conduct requirement discovery and design SAP B1‑based solutions.

·        Deliver demos, presentations, and PoCs.

·        Support RFI/RFP responses, proposals, and quotations.

·        Work with sales on scoping, costing, and timelines.

·        Build and manage customer and partner relationships; grow opportunities.

Project Management

·        Lead full lifecycle SAP B1 implementation projects.

·        Develop project plans, schedules, and risk assessments.

·        Facilitate workshops, blueprinting, testing, UAT, and cutover.

·        Ensure delivery meets scope, budget, and quality.

·        Provide post‑go‑live support and oversee smooth transition to support teams.

Team Leadership

·        Lead and mentor functional and technical consultants.

·        Oversee workload, delivery standards, and performance management.

·        Drive knowledge sharing and training.

·        Support recruitment and maintain accurate customer/prospect records.

·        Ensure compliance with internal SOPs and governance.

JOB REQUIREMENTS

·        Bachelor’s degree in IT, Business, Accounting, or related fields.

·        Pre‑sales experience is mandatory. SAP B1 certification preferred; PMP/Scrum Master is a plus.

·        5–8 years SAP B1 implementation experience; PM/Team Lead preferred.

·        Strong hands‑on SAP Business One expertise (functional or techno‑functional).

·        Knowledge of key SAP B1 modules (Finance, Logistics, Sales, Purchasing, Production).

·        Experience with add‑ons, integration, SQL/HANA is an advantage.

·        Proven ERP project management and customer‑facing leadership.

Working Location: Singapore

Syahirah Binte Ahmad Ja'afar (R22105331) 

JAC Recruitment Pte. Ltd. (90C3026)

postedCompany.description:
JAC is an international recruitment consultancy with over 45 years of specialised recruitment experience across Asia and Europe. We have over 1,200 expert consultants who have a deep cultural understanding of the local markets they operate in. Combined with our regional network and specialised industry focus we are renowned for placing highly skilled permanent and contracting staff into specialist positions.

In Singapore, we cover the Banking and Financial Services, Corporate Services, Digital and Information Technology, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Industrial, Sales & Marketing sectors. We also recruit for contract roles and have a dedicated team that can assist with hiring for Japanese-language skills.

Our job board is updated daily so you can stay updated on jobs as they become available and find the next best role for you.

EA License number: 90C3026
